productDisplayName: Newhide Brown Unisex Antique Passport Holder
description: Crafted from soft, genuine leather, this passport holder from Newhide is an essential to stay organised during travel. Ensure all your important items are organised and arranged in this piece. Newhide leather breathes, regulates temperature to the ambience, prevents dust penetration and has high ripping resistance. Carry your essentials with ease in this classic holder.Dimensions: 20.5 cm X 11 cmWarranty: 1 yearTwo tone leather upper, has one main zippered compartment with a zipperOne flap-and-loopnbsp; closure which has one pocket and id holder on the left and two id holders and four card holders on the right and a pen holder in the centreOne zippered pocket at the backCareRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtWarranty provided by the brand owner / manufacturer
